sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian’ deihna, lungkimna, biakna pia un,
Abel bangin a limci pen pia un;
Na ansalte an tawh kidim ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thupha a namkim kong pia ding hong ci;
Thupha kong pia ding, kong daupai
Thupha a tampi kong pia ding hong i.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Meigong nu sumpi piak bangin pia un;
A sia thei lo vantungah na sum khol un,
hoihna thupha na zeek ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka Biakinn ah, an a om theih nadingin,
Na hoih tampi kong piakna na mu ding
